slides.title: Pharmsource Animal Health
content: Pharmsource Animal Health is a national veterinary pharmaceutical distributor built to support the evolving needs of a rapidly consolidating animal health market.

As a division of Pharmsource, LLC, an independent pharmaceutical wholesaler founded in 2014, the company combines nationwide reach, operational scale, and industry-experienced teams to serve both independent veterinary practices and large corporate hospital networks.

slides.title: Positioned for a Consolidating Veterinary Market
content: The U.S. veterinary industry is undergoing rapid consolidation, with more than 60 major corporate practice groups actively acquiring independent clinics.

Corporate entities are estimated to control 25–50% of all veterinary practices and as much as 75% of specialty and emergency hospitals, significantly increasing the demand for distributors capable of supporting complex, multi-location organizations.
slides.highlight: Pharmsource Animal Health is currently contracted with 32 corporate groups, supporting over 4,130 hospitals and billing corporate entities directly.

slides.title: Trusted by Industry Leaders
slides.description: Current corporate relationships include many of the most recognized veterinary networks in the country:

slides.title: Scale, Financial Strength, and Infrastructure
content: Pharmsource Animal Health generates approximately $15.5M in annual revenue, including $5.5M from corporate hospital partnerships.
The broader Pharmsource organization delivers more than $130M in annual revenue through its Human Health division.

slides.title: Industry-Experienced Teams
content: Pharmsource Animal Health’s commercial model is intentionally relationship-driven. The sales organization consists of 12 representatives, most of whom come from hands-on animal health backgrounds, including veterinary technicians, professional dog handlers, groomers, and trainers.
Sales representatives are structured to maintain 50+ customer touchpoints per day, with relationship building as the primary objective.

slides.title: Compliance & Technology
items: Investment in AI-driven tools & new eCommerce portal

slides.title: Education & Engagement
content: Pharmsource Animal Health maintains an active presence across the veterinary industry through education and engagement.
The company distributes a monthly newsletter to approximately 40,000 subscribers and consistently attends leading industry conferences like VMX and WVC.

slides.text: A Distributor That Understands Veterinary Care. Value, Experience, Integrity.
